title: Be Thou My Vision

tokens.lyric: Be Thou my visio
n, O
Lord
of my
heart;

lines.raw: [D]Be Thou my visio[Bm]n, O[G] Lord [D]of my [A]heart; [D]

tokens.lyric: Naught be all els
e to me, sav
e that Thou art

lines.raw: [A]Naught be all els[D]e to me, sav[G]e that Thou art[A]--

tokens.lyric: Thou my best thoug
ht, by day or by nig
ht,

lines.raw: [G]Thou my best thoug[D]ht, by day or by nig[G]ht,[A]

tokens.lyric: Waking or sleeping, Thy pre
sence m
y light

lines.raw: [D]Waking or sleeping, Thy pre[G]sence m[A]y light[D].

tokens.lyric: Be Thou my wisdom and Thou my true word,

lines.raw: Be Thou my wisdom and Thou my true word,

tokens.lyric: I ever with Thee and Thou with me, Lord;

lines.raw: I ever with Thee and Thou with me, Lord;

tokens.lyric: Thou my great Father, and I Thy true son;

lines.raw: Thou my great Father, and I Thy true son;

tokens.lyric: Thou in me dwelling, and I with Thee one.

lines.raw: Thou in me dwelling, and I with Thee one.

tokens.lyric: Riches I heed not, nor man's empty praise,

lines.raw: Riches I heed not, nor man's empty praise,

tokens.lyric: Thou mine inheritance, now and always;

lines.raw: Thou mine inheritance, now and always;

tokens.lyric: Thou and Thou only, first in my heart,

lines.raw: Thou and Thou only, first in my heart,

tokens.lyric: High king of heaven, my treasure Thou art.

lines.raw: High king of heaven, my treasure Thou art.

tokens.lyric: High king of heaven, my victory won,

lines.raw: High king of heaven, my victory won,

tokens.lyric: May I reach heaven's joys, O bright heaven's son!

lines.raw: May I reach heaven's joys, O bright heaven's son!

tokens.lyric: Heart of my own heart, whatever befall,

lines.raw: Heart of my own heart, whatever befall,

tokens.lyric: Still be my vision, O ruler of all.

lines.raw: Still be my vision, O ruler of all.
